title: Don't remove config files with podman system reset
body:
Check if storage.conf exists and display a message that
this file should be removed if it has not been modified.

Fixes #7447

comments.body: @Luap99 Can you rebase? the rootless RCLI:true test is once again passing on master

LGTM
but it looks like the endpoint test might be misbehaving now.
